title: Minor finger laceration — small wound
source: Synthetic case based on Manchester Triage System flowchart 'Wounds'

patient.name: James Cooper
patient.chief_complaint: Cut index finger while cooking about 1 hour ago, small wound still oozing slightly
symptoms: small laceration on left index finger
patient.notes: Superficial 1.5 cm laceration on palmar surface of left index finger. Bleeding controlled with direct pressure. Full range of motion preserved. Sensation intact distally. No tendon involvement. Last tetanus booster 3 years ago.
